title: Fluffy Garlic French Stir-fry
description: A savory and aromatic monsoon-inspired French dish infused with the boldness of garlic and the freshness of makrut lime leaves, served as a keto-friendly snack.
instructions: Season the chicken fillet with salt and pepper on both sides. Place it in a baking dish.
In a skillet, combine the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until fragrant and translucent.
Add the sliced bell pepper and eggplant to the skillet along with any residual liquid from the chicken. Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the vegetable mixture onto the baking dish containing the seasoned chicken fillet. Drizzle with butter or olive oil if desired.
Broil in preheated oven until the vegetables are tender and slightly charred on top (about 10-12 minutes).
Remove from heat, season to taste with salt and pepper, and serve warm.
